tools.name: whoami
tools.title: Who am I
tools.description: Return the signed-in BathOS user's id and email.

tools.name: get_garage
tools.title: Get Garage Data
tools.description: Read Garage vehicles, services, or servicings for the signed-in user.

resource.description: Garage resource to read: vehicles, services, or servicings.

vehicle_id.description: Vehicle id required for services and servicings.

id.description: Optional record id to narrow the result.

tools.name: set_garage
tools.title: Set Garage Data
tools.description: Create, update, or delete Garage vehicles, services, or servicings for the signed-in user.

id.description: Record id required for update and delete.

vehicle_id.description: Vehicle id required for service and servicing mutations.

data.description: Record fields for create or update. Owner fields are ignored.

outcomes.description: Optional servicing service outcomes for servicings.

tools.name: get_snake
tools.title: Get Snake Data
tools.description: Read snakes, weight records, or growth expectation ranges for an accessible Snake household.

snake_id.description: Optional snake id for weight records.

id.description: Optional record id to narrow the result.

tools.name: set_snake
tools.title: Set Snake Data
tools.description: Create, update, or delete snakes and weight records for an accessible Snake household.

id.description: Record id required for update and delete.

data.description: Record fields for create or update. Owner fields are ignored.

tools.name: get_budget
tools.title: Get Budget Data
tools.description: Read Budget household summary, settings, expenses, incomes, budgets, categories, or payment methods.

id.description: Optional record id to narrow the result.

tools.name: set_budget
tools.title: Set Budget Data
tools.description: Create, update, or delete Budget records, or update Budget household partner settings.

id.description: Record id required for update and delete.

data.description: Record fields for create or update. Owner fields are ignored.

tools.name: get_wardrobe
tools.title: Get Wardrobe Data
tools.description: Read Wardrobe items for the signed-in user.

id.description: Optional item id to narrow the result.

tools.name: set_wardrobe
tools.title: Set Wardrobe Data
tools.description: Create, update, or delete Wardrobe items for the signed-in user.

id.description: Item id required for update and delete.

data.description: Item fields for create or update. Owner fields are ignored.

tools.name: get_task_hierarchy
tools.title: Get Task Hierarchy
tools.description: Read the signed-in user's normalized task areas, projects, headings, to-dos, and checklist items. Returns stable ids and relationship fields without mutating data.

root_type.description: Read the complete bounded hierarchy or scope it to one area, project, heading, or to-do.

root_id.description: Required when root_type is not all.

include_terminal.description: Include completed and canceled projects and to-dos.

limit.description: Maximum rows returned per hierarchy collection.

tools.name: get_task_record
tools.title: Get Task Record
tools.description: Read one task area, project, heading, to-do, or checklist item by stable id for the signed-in user.

tools.name: get_task_view
tools.title: Get Task Planning View
tools.description: Read the signed-in user's Today, Upcoming, Anytime, Someday, or Done view using the Tasks domain rules.

planning_date.description: Optional ISO calendar date for deterministic planning review. Defaults to today in the owner's stored planning time zone.

limit.description: Maximum projects, to-dos, or Done roots returned.

tools.name: get_task_templates
tools.title: Get Task Templates
tools.description: Read the signed-in user's native to-do and project templates with each current immutable revision and relative planning snapshot.

tools.name: get_task_recurrences
tools.title: Get Task Recurrences
tools.description: Read owner-scoped recurrence definitions, immutable current rules, and optionally their generated occurrence identities.

tools.name: get_task_reminders
tools.title: Get Task Reminders
tools.description: Read owner-scoped reminder intent, resolved UTC instants, resolution decisions, and optionally immutable occurrence identities.

tools.name: create_task
tools.title: Create Task
tools.description: Create one owner-scoped to-do with structured planning and source fields. A required idempotency key makes exact retries safe.

idempotency_key.description: Stable UUID for this logical creation request. Reuse it only to retry the exact same request.

actionability.description: Whether the task can be acted on now or is waiting on something external.

entry_channel.description: Structured integration that collected the task. Ordinary MCP clients should keep the default.

source.description: Optional typed source reference. Template provenance is reserved for template instantiation.

tools.name: create_task_area
tools.title: Create Task Area
tools.description: Create one owner-scoped task area with safe exact-retry behavior.

idempotency_key.description: Stable UUID for this logical creation request. Reuse it only for an exact retry.

tools.name: create_task_project
tools.title: Create Task Project
tools.description: Create one owner-scoped open project with structured placement and planning fields.

idempotency_key.description: Stable UUID for this logical creation request. Reuse it only for an exact retry.

tools.name: create_task_heading
tools.title: Create Task Heading
tools.description: Create one owner-scoped heading beneath an accessible open project.

idempotency_key.description: Stable UUID for this logical creation request. Reuse it only for an exact retry.

tools.name: create_task_checklist_item
tools.title: Create Task Checklist Item
tools.description: Create one owner-scoped checklist item beneath an accessible open to-do.

idempotency_key.description: Stable UUID for this logical creation request. Reuse it only for an exact retry.

tools.name: update_task_area
tools.title: Update Task Area
tools.description: Rename one owner-scoped present task area through an optimistic revision boundary.

client_mutation_id.description: Stable UUID for this exact logical mutation.

tools.name: update_task_project
tools.title: Update Task Project
tools.description: Edit supported content on one owner-scoped open project through an optimistic revision boundary.

client_mutation_id.description: Stable UUID for this exact logical mutation.

tools.name: update_task_heading
tools.title: Update Task Heading
tools.description: Rename one owner-scoped heading beneath an open project through an optimistic revision boundary.

client_mutation_id.description: Stable UUID for this exact logical mutation.

tools.name: update_task_checklist_item
tools.title: Update Task Checklist Item
tools.description: Edit or complete one owner-scoped checklist item beneath an open to-do through an optimistic revision boundary.

client_mutation_id.description: Stable UUID for this exact logical mutation.

tools.name: transition_task_hierarchy
tools.title: Transition Task Hierarchy
tools.description: Complete, cancel, or reopen one project, or recoverably delete or restore one area, project, heading, or checklist item with one atomic revision-checked hierarchy operation. Permanent deletion is not available.

expected_revision.description: Current root revision returned by a task hierarchy read.

client_mutation_id.description: Stable UUID for this logical mutation. Reuse it only to retry the exact same request.

descendant_policy.description: Project completion or cancellation policy. Omit for the safe reject default; cascade must be explicit.

tools.name: move_task_project
tools.title: Move Task Project
tools.description: Move one open project to an area, a planning placement, or both without accepting raw order keys.

client_mutation_id.description: Stable UUID for this exact logical mutation. Reuse it only for an exact retry.

area_id.description: Present area or null for no area.

tools.name: schedule_task_project
tools.title: Schedule Task Project
tools.description: Set or clear one open project start date or deadline without accepting timestamps or time-zone offsets.

client_mutation_id.description: Stable UUID for this exact logical mutation. Reuse it only for an exact retry.

tools.name: create_mail_task
tools.title: Create Mail Task
tools.description: Atomically create one AI-processed Today task and its structured Mail source lifecycle record. Intended for a verified Mail integration, not generic task creation.

idempotency_key.description: Stable UUID for this logical Mail capture. Reuse it only for an exact retry.

area_id.description: Optional accessible area for verified work-mail routing.

tools.name: begin_mail_retirement
tools.title: Begin Mail Retirement
tools.description: Mark one retained or explicitly failed Mail source as pending immediately before attempting its external Mail move.

task_id.description: Mail-sourced task identifier returned by create_mail_task.

idempotency_key.description: Stable UUID for this exact lifecycle mutation.

tools.name: resolve_mail_retirement
tools.title: Resolve Mail Retirement
tools.description: Record the verified success or bounded failure of a pending external Mail move.

task_id.description: Mail-sourced task identifier returned by create_mail_task.

idempotency_key.description: Stable UUID for this exact lifecycle mutation.

tools.name: update_task
tools.title: Update Task
tools.description: Edit one current to-do title, notes, actionability, or complete typed source reference with an optimistic revision guard.

expected_revision.description: Current revision returned by a task read.

client_mutation_id.description: Stable UUID for this logical mutation. Reuse it only to retry the exact same request.

actionability.description: Mark the task actionable now or waiting on something external.

source.description: Complete replacement source, null to clear, or omit to preserve.

tools.name: move_task
tools.title: Move Task
tools.description: Move one open to-do between planning placements, hierarchy containers, or both. Container changes require all three container IDs, using null to clear.

expected_revision.description: Current revision returned by a task read.

client_mutation_id.description: Stable UUID for this logical mutation. Reuse it only to retry the exact same request.

tools.name: schedule_task
tools.title: Schedule Task
tools.description: Set or clear one open to-do start date or deadline without accepting timestamps or time-zone offsets.

expected_revision.description: Current revision returned by a task read.

client_mutation_id.description: Stable UUID for this logical mutation. Reuse it only to retry the exact same request.

tools.name: transition_task
tools.title: Transition Task
tools.description: Complete, cancel, reopen, recoverably delete, or restore one to-do. Permanent deletion is not available.

expected_revision.description: Current revision returned by a task read.

client_mutation_id.description: Stable UUID for this logical mutation. Reuse it only to retry the exact same request.

tools.name: reorder_task
tools.title: Reorder Task
tools.description: Move one open to-do up or down within its planning section or exact hierarchy peers without accepting a raw order key.

client_mutation_id.description: Stable UUID for this exact logical reorder. Reuse it only for an exact retry.

direction.description: Move one position up or down within the exact peer scope.

view.description: Required for planning order and omitted for hierarchy order.

planning_date.description: Explicit deterministic planning date required for planning order.

tools.name: reorder_task_hierarchy
tools.title: Reorder Task Hierarchy
tools.description: Move one area, project, heading, or checklist item up or down within its exact structural peers, or reorder a project within one planning section.

client_mutation_id.description: Stable UUID for this exact logical reorder. Reuse it only for an exact retry.

direction.description: Move one position up or down within the exact peer scope.

scope.description: Defaults to structural. Planning is available only for projects.

view.description: Required only for project planning order.

planning_date.description: Explicit deterministic date required only for project planning order.

tools.name: instantiate_task_template
tools.title: Instantiate Task Template
tools.description: Atomically create a complete to-do or project hierarchy from one native template revision for an explicit calendar date.

template_revision.description: Immutable revision to create. Defaults to the template current revision.

anchor_date.description: Explicit reference date used to preserve relative start dates and deadlines.

target_area_id.description: Optional accessible destination area for a project template.

idempotency_key.description: Stable UUID for this exact creation request. Reuse only for an exact retry.

tools.name: save_task_recurrence
tools.title: Save Task Recurrence
tools.description: Create or revise one recurrence definition from an immutable native task-template revision. Existing generated work never changes.

recurrence_id.description: Existing recurrence to revise. Omit to create.

expected_record_revision.description: Required current record revision when revising an existing recurrence.

idempotency_key.description: Stable UUID for this exact save request.

tools.name: set_task_recurrence_status
tools.title: Set Task Recurrence Status
tools.description: Pause, resume, or permanently archive one recurrence definition without changing existing generated work.

idempotency_key.description: Stable UUID for this exact status request.

tools.name: evaluate_task_recurrence
tools.title: Evaluate Task Recurrence
tools.description: Request idempotent server-side catch-up for one recurrence through an explicit local calendar date.

idempotency_key.description: Stable UUID for this exact evaluation request.

tools.name: save_task_reminder
tools.title: Save Task Reminder
tools.description: Create or revise one task or project reminder from explicit local date, wall-clock time, IANA time zone, and daylight-saving ambiguity choice.

reminder_id.description: Existing reminder to revise. Omit to create.

expected_record_revision.description: Required current record revision when revising an existing reminder.

idempotency_key.description: Stable UUID for this exact save request.

tools.name: cancel_task_reminder
tools.title: Cancel Task Reminder
tools.description: Cancel one reminder and every still-pending delivery occurrence without deleting its portable schedule history.

idempotency_key.description: Stable UUID for this exact cancellation request.
